## What does this change?

<!-- A short description of the change and the motivation behind it.
     Link the related issue, e.g. "Closes #123". -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] `go vet ./...` and `gofmt -l .` are clean
- [ ] `node --check web/app.js` passes (if the UI changed)
- [ ] I matched the style of the surrounding code
- [ ] I added or updated tests / docs where it makes sense
- [ ] For a new feature: an issue was opened first to agree on the approach
